utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), and total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes all of these: destination ('Lisbon, Portugal'), travel_dates ('July 11–16, 2024'), transportation (flight details with costs and specifics), accommodation (hotel with all details and costs), activities (with full details and costs), additional_services (dining with costs), and total_budget (detailed cost breakdown with total). All are fully specified with the required details.
